features.General Features: Breathable structure: air holes for ventilation and heat dissipation | Adjustment spin dial and strap to insure the perfect fit | Helmet pads with shock absorbent material | Securely close the helmet by usage of the buckle and straps | Light weight for comfort and easy usage | Soft fabric liner for ultimate comfort, detachable and washable for your convenience | Adults: fits 54 - 60 cm, 21.3 - 23.6 inches head circumference
features.What's in the box?: 1x Segway Adult Helmet | 1x Adjustable Chin Strap | 1x User Manual
